name: maxtdesign-role-based-pricing
description: Release tooling for MaxtDesign Role-Based Pricing for WooCommerce. The plugin ships only PHP and unminified CSS — no JS or CSS build step is required.

scripts.build: echo "No build step required for this plugin."
scripts.build:admin-css: echo "No CSS build step (assets/css/admin.css is shipped as-is)."
scripts.build:admin-js: echo "No JS build step (admin scripts are inlined via wp_add_inline_script)."
scripts.lint:php: php -l maxtdesign-role-based-pricing.php && php -l uninstall.php && php -l includes/class-admin.php && php -l includes/class-core.php && php -l includes/class-frontend.php
